entry.title: AI in Test Automation
entry.content:
The use of artificial intelligence (AI) in test automation is the latest trend in quality assurance. Testing, in general, and test automation, in particular, seems to have caught the “everything's better with AI” bug.

Since AI, machine learning, and neural networks are the hottest thing right now, it is perhaps inevitable that AI would find its way into test automation somehow.

A Background in Test Automation

I recall a time several years ago, back when test automation was still new, when one of my quality assurance teams was working on a project for a large customer. It was a mobile application with millions of users and monthly release cycles. The QA team was usually relaxed during the first two weeks of the cycle and working frantically thereafter till release—one of the peculiar side effects of agile software development that you don’t read about in the headlines!

Finally, one of the QA leads, fed up with twiddling his thumbs during the lean two weeks, started working on a framework for test automation. He wrote up some test scripts in Ruby with Selenium / Appium and Jenkins for a rudimentary pipeline, including some pretty reports with Red / Yellow / Green indicators for test failure/success.

He successfully did this for a couple of release cycles. That’s when we presented it to our Quality Chief, who pitched it to our customers and got them excited enough to pay for automated testing as a sub-project. We were on cloud nine, on the bleeding edge of things!

Bleeding edge took on a new meaning, however, in a few months when we discovered that fundamental truth about test automation that any QA automation engineer worth their salt wrestles with today

Test automation has not fundamentally changed since then because it still requires continuous monitoring and maintenance. Any possibility for dramatic improvement in the approach and implementation has only appeared with the recent advancement in the capabilities of AI.

Will AI actually be able to help automatically generate and update test cases? Find bugs? Improve code coverage?

The answer to that question is far from clear right now because we’re at the peak of the hype cycle for AI. A specific sub-field, deep learning, has caused a lot of this excitement.

How Does Machine Learning Produce Automated Tests?

  1. Training: In the training phase, the machine learning model needs to be trained on a specific organizational dataset, including the codebase, application interface, logs, test cases, and even specification documents. Not having a sufficiently large training dataset can reduce the efficacy of the algorithm.

    Some tools have pre-trained models that are updated through continuous learning for specific applications like UI testing so that generalized learning can be used in a specific organization.

  2. Output / Result generation: Depending on the use case, the model generates test cases, checks existing test cases for code coverage, completeness, accuracy, and even performs tests. In all cases, a tester needs to check the output generated to get validation and ensure that it is usable. If we use the analogy of self-driving cars, the results are more like driving assistance than an actual driverless car.
  3. Continuous improvement: As an organization keeps using the tool regularly, the training data keeps increasing, thereby potentially increasing the accuracy and effectiveness of existing trained networks. In short, the AI system keeps learning and improving.

 

Applications Of AI In Test Automation

Let's take a closer look at some applications of AI in test automation including unit testing , user interface testing, API testing , and maintaining an automation test suite.

Creating And Updating Unit Tests

Unit testing , often used as part of continuous testing, continuous integration / continuous delivery (CI / CD) in DevOps , can be a real pain in the… asteroid belt.

Typically, developers spend significant amounts of time authoring and maintaining unit tests, which is nowhere near as much fun as writing application code. In this instance, AI-based products for automated unit test creation can be useful, especially for those organizations that plan to introduce unit tests late in the product life cycle.

Benefits: 

  • AI-based automated unit tests are a significant step ahead of template-based automated unit test generation using static or dynamic analysis. The tests so generated are actual code, not just stubs.
  • AI-based unit tests can be generated very quickly, which is useful for a large existing codebase.
  • Developers just need to modify tests and can set up the unit regression suite relatively quickly.

Limitations: 

  • AI-generated unit tests simply mirror the code on which they are built. They cannot as yet guess the intended functionality of the code. If the code does not behave as intended, the unit test generated for that code will reflect that unintended behavior.

    This is a significant minus because the whole point of unit tests is to enforce and verify an implicit or explicit contract.
  • Unit tests generated using machine learning can break existing working unit tests, and it is up to a developer to ensure that this does not happen.
  • Developers need to write tests for complex business logic themselves.

Automated User Interface Testing 

This is an area where AI is beginning to shine. In AI-based UI testing, test automation tools parse the DOM and related code to ascertain object properties. They also use image recognition techniques to navigate through the application and verify UI objects and elements visually to create UI tests.

Additionally, AI test systems use exploratory testing to find bugs or variations in the application UI and generate screenshots for later verification by a QA engineer. Similarly, the visual aspects of the System Under Test (SUT) such as layout, size, and color can be verified.

Benefits:

  • Automated UI testing can lead to increased code coverage.
  • Minor deviations in the UI do not cause the test suite to fail. Product AI models can handle these.

Limitations:

  • For any modern application, the number of platforms, app versions, and browser versions is large. It is not clear how well AI-based UI automation performs under these conditions. However, cloud testing tools can execute tests in parallel, so this is going to be an interesting space to watch!

Using AI To Assist In API Testing

Even without AI, automating API testing is a non-trivial task since it involves understanding the API and then setting up tests for a multitude of scenarios to ensure depth and breadth of coverage.

Current API test automation tools , like Tricentis and SoapUI, record API activities and traffic to analyze and create tests. However, modifying and updating tests require testers to delve into the minutiae of REST calls and parameters, and then update the API test suite.

AI-based API automation testing  tools attempt to mitigate this problem by examining traffic and identifying patterns and connections between API calls, effectively grouping them by scenario. Tools also use existing tests to learn about relationships between APIs, use these to understand changes in APIs, and update existing tests or create new scenario-based tests. 

Benefits:

  • For novice testers or those without programming experience, this could be really helpful to get them to “hit the ground running”.

    Once again, change management would be significantly easier given that at least some of the API changes can be handled by an AI automation tool.

Limitations:

  • In general, API testing is difficult to set up, and not many tools offer machine learning based capabilities in this space. The ones that do seem to have pretty rudimentary capabilities.

Automation Test Maintenance

AI-based tools can evaluate changes to the code and fix several existing tests that don't align with those changes, especially if those code changes are not too complex. Updates to UI elements, field names, and the like need not break the test suite anymore.

Some AI tools monitor running tests and try out modified variants for failed tests by choosing UI elements based on the best fit. They can also verify test coverage and supplement the gaps if needed. 

 

AI-Based Test Data Generation

Test data generation is another promising area for AI models. Machine learning can easily generate data sets, like personal profile photographs and information like age and weight, based on trained machine learning models using existing production datasets to learn. 

In this way, the test data generated is very similar to production data which is ideal for use in software testing . The machine learning model that generates data is called a Generative Adversarial Network  (GAN).

 

Conclusion

Artificial intelligence has significantly impacted testing tools and methods, and test automation in particular. An overview of the current tools promising AI shows that, while many new features are being added, several of those features are still on their way to maturity.

entry.title: Re: Error loading Fiori Application - App could not be op...
entry.content:
only one that seems like relavent is this one

"Log-dbg.js:452 2024-05-22 15:15:47.593199 Failed to resolve navigation target: #FioriApplication-display. This is most likely caused by an incorrect SAP Fiori launchpad content configuration or by missing role assignment. - Could not resolve navigation target sap.ushell.renderers.fiori2.Shell.controller"

entry.title: Re: Push S/4 HANA Data Event to BTP Event Mesh in ABAP OO Mode
entry.content:
Hi @stephen_xue 

Great blog, if I´m not wrong, this approach, pushes the zevent from SAP to EM, via HTTPs doing the OAuth.

What I´d like to do, is to create a New "ZTopic" in SAP that event mesh can subscribe to. So that the event are forwarded to EM via the normal "AMQP Enterprose Service Channel" that we use for standard events.

Do you know if this is possible? Creating new topic from zevents?

Thanks in advance!

Mikel

Hi Folks,

Greetings,

For one of requirement, I need to add new fields into Line Items of SAP Manage sales order app.
May I know how do I achieve this either using developer extensibility or classic extensibility.?

if developer extensibility I tried adding new fields they are placing at custom fields tab, but I need those fields into line-Item table.

 

Regards,
Hiriyappa

entry.title: Re: DTW PROBLEM WITH INCOMING PAYMENT PARTIALLY PAID

entry.title: Re: Billing on Future Date
entry.content:
Hello @sambtr ,

If you are looking to change the billing date when creating a billing document you can do so in the app Create Billing Documents. Please select the button Billing Settings first and make sure the selection set Billing Date and Type before billing is turned on. You can then select the items from the list that should be included in the billing document and click the button Create Billing Documents. A popup shows that allows to choose the billing due date.

Kind regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Extraction Filter for M2S JCDS
entry.content: Hi Evan, For some reason the filter doesn't work when I use it in a basic extraction. If I use the filter in Advanced Extraction it works. Thanks 🙂 Greetings Niels

entry.title: Support for multiple user roles in Integration flows sender Adapters (HTTP, SOAP, REST, ODATA etc)
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a scenario where I have two packages PackageA and PackageB both packages contain Synchronous iflows with HTTP Sender adapter,

PackageA iflows are accessible only via custom role PackageAMessaging.send 

and 

PackageB iflows are accessible only via custom role PackageBMessaging.send 

The reason I have this package based UserRole setup is that these packages are called by individual systems and house all the iflows being used only by one particular sender (so far we didnt have any overlaps between packages)

Now PackageA consumer needs to access another iFlow that exists in PackageB that happens to be an ODATA API exposed via the http sender adapter. Http Sender adapter doesnt have a provision for multiple Userroles and supports only one user role at a time. I want to avoid duplicating this iflow on another http sender endpoint and I want to reuse the existing iflow. How can I do that?

I do not want to share the PackageBMessaging.send credentials with Package A consumer and I also dont want to add PackageBMessaging.send Role in the BTP cockpit instance that I have for PackageA.

entry.title: New stock restriction type
entry.content:
Hi team 

How to configure new stock type to involve restricted and block batches but we want to consider new stock type in MRP run and to be considered in stock reports. Kindly guide.

entry.title: Error: 'Payroll area not found in T549A. IT0001 Error' in ECPAO_EE_ORG_REPL_QUERY program
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have hired new employees in SuccessFactors EC with Payroll area 'A1' maintained in Compensation information portlet. All the Org objects are replicated to ECC Successfully using Org Object Replication Query Program SFIOM_QRY_ORG_OBJ.

When i replicate employee master data for new hires using the program ECPAO_EE_ORG_REPL_QUERY the query run is successful, But in SLG1 log i get Error 'Payroll area is not found in T549A. Info type 0001 Error'. Note, the payroll area is already configured in T549A, and i am able to hire employee directly in ECC with the same payroll area 'A1'.

Also note, I have no issues in replicating existing employee belonging to the same payroll area, and the issue is for the New Hires Only.

Please guide what i have been missing out. Your help is much appreciated. Thanks

Regards,

JP

Thanks,

Fabrício Souza

entry.title: Re: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (readi...
entry.content:
You are using cds@7.6.2, I was able to reproduce the issue with this version.

→ Please run `npm install` again, the error has been fixed with `@sap/cds@7.9^`.

entry.title: Re: New stock restriction type
entry.content:
Hello @rammeshokumar 

I don't think you can customize new stock types in ERP.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Error while create service contract by BAPI (BAPI_CON...
entry.content:
Hello @rahuxingh8 

That is a missing functionality - service items are not supported by BAPI_CONTRACT_CREATE. See the note 1977343 - BAPI_CONTRACT_CREATE for service or limit items

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: Comply and Automate to Electronic Invoices in Malaysia with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
entry.content:
Join this session for having an overview of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance and delve into the specifics of e-invoicing for Malaysia, the necessary documentation, and how you can get ready to implement the solution in your business.

Speakers:

  • Mike Vorias - Regional Director, Office of CFO Solutions, SAP Asia Pacific Japan
  • Jasmine Elone Farah - Manager, oCFO Solution Advisors at SAP Southeast Asia, SAP Southeast Asia
  • Amit Rai - Product Expert, SAP Asia Pacific Japan

Register here

entry.title: Re: New Card Upload Process and Role-based Filtering of Cards in Work Zone Adv
entry.content:
@jinghe 

  • It is no longer possible to directly deploy a card created via the Development Tools for SAP Build Work Zone extension in SAP Business Application Studio to the subaccount.

Is this a temporary issue that will be fixed shortly (OR) has the process completely changed...  From the wordings in the blog, it looks like a permanent change - But it also feels like a temporary issue.

Can we no longer deploy a card created in Business Application Studio from within Business Application Studio ?  Is this a temporary issue (if so, timeline for fix) OR a change in process ?

entry.title: Re: How to connect the QR-code reader for processing the...
entry.content: Short update, here's the link to the changed PostFinance blog with some additional information regarding well-known Swiss scanner solutions which might be of help. For more information, see DE website https://www.postfinance.ch/de/support/produkte/e-finance-login/belegleser.html / EN website https://www.postfinance.ch/en/support/products/e-finance-login/slip-scanners.html.

entry.title: Re: DTW Inventory Posting Error
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the reply. It was so helpful and solved my problem.

It seems the inventory posting doesn't accept the actual quantity of the item batch, but its variance (+ or -). So if I have an initial quantity of 10 for batch 1, I will have to input it as -2 if the counted quantity is 8. However the inventory count takes the actual quantity per batch as input.

Thank you so much 🙂

entry.title: Connect to SuccessFactors by using an "OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion" destination
entry.content:
Hi everyone 😃

I will try to expone my scenario as clear as possible. I am just trying to create a first "SAP Build App" to connect to SuccessFactors Employee Central. I have no problem getting this done by creating a BTP Destination by using "Basic Authentication". 

However, I cannot get this done by creating an endpoint of type "OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion". From BTP Destinations side, the connectivity check seems to be working fine (HTTP 200 response), but when I try to add this integration within my application, I always get the attached error.

Any support will be more than appreciated.

Thank you in advanced !!!

entry.title: Custom sorting with BW 7.3 source system at Webi 4.3
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I must implement custom sorting based on the depth of Hirearch nodes, yet the source system is BW7.3. X

The Data was displayed in the Hierarchy node level as mentioned in the below format
Country---> State--> Cities--> Town 
Whenever the user enters the prompt value for the country example India, it should display data in custom sorting-based hierarchy nodes. Please find attached a reference screenshot of the data 
Current Hirearichy nodes in Webi 

Country Name country .depth 
India 1
     Telangana2
         Hyderabad 4
             Warangal 5
Tamil Naidu 4
           Chennai 4
            Coimbatore5
Maharashtra 2
             Mumbai4
               Pune5
            Navi Mumbai6
Kerala 5
         Thiruvananthapuram4
                Kochi4
              Kollam4
New Dehil 3
  Nodia 8
Gokal Pur8

Expected output 

Country Name country .depth 
India 1
     Telangana2
         Hyderabad 4
             Warangal 5
Maharashtra 2
             Mumbai4
               Pune5
            Navi Mumbai6
New Dehil 3
  Nodia 4
Gokal Pur5
Tamil Naidu 4
           Chennai 4
            Coimbatore5
Kerala 5
         Thiruvananthapuram4
                Kochi5
              Kollam6

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hi @ido_perez, Thanks for your feedback.

I am able to run llama3-70b (Q4_0, size as 40G) with resource plan on infer.l(T4 - 16G GPU VRAM) and train.l(V100 - 16 G GPU VRAM) in SAP AI Core. However, it is very slow, taking 2~3 minutes to respond to a simple task such as "tell me a joke".

Apparently, the GPU capacity of current resource plan in SAP AI Core is insufficient to host a such size of model. As the screenshot below, it can only offload 29/81 layers of the model to GPU as attached screenshot.

It will be slightly faster(still very slow) with Q2(26G) or Q3(31~37G) quantization. However, the quality may be compromised.

For llama3:70b-instruct-q2_K, llm_load_tensors: offloaded 42/81 layers to GPU, it still takes around 1 minutes to respond the very simple task like "tell me a joke".

In summary, with resource plans of current SAP AI Core, it is not able to host a 70b models with a decent speed.

Kind Regards,
Yatsea

entry.title: Re: "WA_TOP1" cannot be converted to the row type of "IT_TOP1". The reverse is a
entry.content: Note that you're using outdated code, don't declare global variables, don't use TABLES. Instead, use inline declarations, constructor expressions and so on. Don't transfer the constant "SY-REPID" into an intermediate variable, use it directly without intermediate.

entry.title: Re: EC Time Sheet - How to stop breaks outside of working...
entry.content: Hi Volker - I tried lots of different ways to get this to work, but I have hit a brick wall. If you are able to share a more detailed example I'd really appreciate it. Thanks

entry.title: Critical BAPIs and Functional Modules
entry.content:
Hi

Can someone tell what if these BAPIs are critical hence granting access to them to be restricted? What would be the reason?

 

BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_*

BAPI_JOBROLE_CLONE

BAPI_USER_*

SUSR_USER_CHANGE_PASSWORD_RFC

BUBA_3

PRGN_BAPIS

SUSO

SU_USER

entry.title: Information Classification - Will it work in a mixed deployment
entry.content:
I have followed the 3409349 - How to enable Information Classification - BI 4.3 SP04 - Windows Only  and did the installation where my CMS.exe runs.

I have webservers that run on Linux, and this KB doesn't refer to any needed changes there but when I access a report and right click and select Sensitivity off the menu (when this shows I have completed the KB setup) the whole system locks up and I have to restart Tomcat to get it functioning again.

Anything I might be missing or do the Tomcat webservers need to be deployed in Windows?

entry.title: Re: New stock restriction type
entry.content:
Hello @rammeshokumar 

But what is really the problem? Can you describe your business requirements?

Cheers

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Public Cloud Profitability Report
entry.content:
Hi Cloud Experts,

I want to report my profitability. I wanna see a report like a KE24. We have "Market Segments - Actual" and "P&L". But these reports give me all my accounts. We need only profit and costs report with characteristics

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP MDK ListPicker multi item select and pass to backend in Item Navigation while creating Header
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to implement SAP MDK offline solution. Our requirement is to Select Multiple Items (Material1, Material2, Material3...) through list picker and pass it to Item Navigation while creating the Order(Header entity). However, while using OData Action available in MDK, we are not able to pass multiple Items in Navigation. Is there any way of passing the selected items from Listpicker to Item navigation.

As of now we are able to pass only one item in navigation (/Item) while creating Header entity.

#SAP MDK

#Listpicker

#SAP Mobile Services

@Jitendra_Kansal 

@bill_froelich

entry.title: Re: New stock restriction type
entry.content: Objective - create a new restriction type for greater possibility used materials to avoid this part of material difference in MRP running.Now we have three types of restrictions Q/X/S, X and S restriction type can not run MRP

entry.title: Re: New stock restriction type
entry.content: We want to consider restricted and block batches in MRP run.

entry.title: Introducing our New Integration Learning Program for Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
SAP has always been at the forefront of maximizing business outcomes with cloud-based products wrapped up in its impressive Customer Experience solution portfolio. One such offering is SAP Commerce Cloud, an original platform-as-a-service (PaaS) solution targeted towards automating and integrating end-to-end commerce scenarios.

However, the potential for adapting SAP Commerce Cloud to various enterprise needs and third-party solutions makes a critical difference.

From importing up-to-the-minute pricing data, calculating loyalty points for products, notifying users about restocks or executing payments, SAP Commerce Cloud wields extensive scope in its integration capability. Regardless of whether you're synthesizing the solution with other SAP solutions like SAP Customer Data Cloud or SAP S/4HANA, or you wish to extend it to a variety of common situations - the possibilities are vast.

Yet, the goal here is have a friendly way of extending and integrating your solution.

When it comes to determining strategies for integrating SAP Commerce Cloud, the aim is to evaluate the appropriate options fitting company needs. The decisions should be strategic and productive, tailoring the incredible capabilities of this solution to the needs of your organization and its scale.

 The goal is to move away from "classic", tightly coupled in-app extensions of SAP Commerce and move towards a decoupled, cloud-friendly way of extending and integrating your SAP Commerce Cloud solution. This course will use some of the key aspects covered to guide you in your decision on which integration options might be best

Let's check what can you find in our reinvented integration Learning Program for guiding you in your integration scenarios.

Through this learning program you will get information about extending and integrating your SAP Commerce Cloud solution along with other SAP products, such as SAP S/4HANA, along with third-party solutions and also some guidelines to choose the ideal integration strategy for various scenarios. 

What you can find is

  • Learn about SAP Customer Experience solutions Integration and Extension Options
  •  Introduction to SAP Commerce Integrations 
  • How to integrate and Extend SAP Commerce Cloud Solution
  • Common Integration Scenarios for SAP Commerce Cloud
  •  Integration essentials for Intelligent Selling Services

 The transformation brought by SAP Commerce Cloud is not limited to mere operational tweaks but serves to redefine how businesses perceive and evolve their commercial endeavors. SAP Commerce Cloud ceaselessly works towards a unified and more accessible commerce landscape, driving more value in the customer journey and turning potential into reality.

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

Any questions? Please, contact the Value map team! 

Mónica Domingo

Global Topic Owner - SAP Customer Experience Solutions

entry.title: Restricting a filter list with another filter - SAC analytics story
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a dimension with a long list of members and a property. When I create an input control for the members, the entire list appears. I want to filter this list based on the property.

I considered adding a second input control to filter by the property. The combination of these filters is applied to the table, but the members list in the input control still shows all members.

Is there a way to code a dependency between these two input controls?

Thank you 

Deb

entry.title: How do we send the PO Output to Partner Type LS instead of Partner Type LI on SAP S/4 HANA?
entry.content: Hello Experts, we are implementing SAP S/4 HANA. The customer does not want to maintain each and every vendor as a Partner under Partner Type for Purchase Order output. How do we send the PO Output to Partner Type LS instead of Partner Type LI on SAP S/4 HANA when we create PO using ME21N?

entry.title: Eclipse local history is empty
entry.content:
Just discovered that I have somehow lost a pageful of notes in a class source, so I thought this might be a good time to check how Eclipse does the source comparison with a local version.

Thing is, the option to compare with local history is not present, at all! I'm not terribly worried, I save everything to an internal gitea instance via abapGit at the end of the day but still... it bugs me.

Preferences in ADT look normal:

Maybe I am missing something here, but... should I explicitly generate a local version to be able to recall it later or is that automatic? What triggers the versioning?

entry.title: Re: Moving SAC Story Filters around
entry.content:
Hello again,

There has been a satisfying answer for the last couple of months, so I thought I'd put it here for people searching: 

Story settings > View Time Settings > Filter Panel

Then: Filter Order = Custom order. There you can rearrange with drag & drop and buttons.

Stéphane

entry.title: Re: Are SAP ASE and IQ On Premise maintained?
entry.content:
Both SAP ASE and SAP IQ continue to be fully maintained. The latest PL release for SAP ASE was released 13.05.2024 and the latest PL release for SAP IQ was released 22.03.2024. 

 

Product Management and Engineering are currently discussing future release plans and I expect to have an update within the next month. 

I would recommend that SAP IQ customers take a look at SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake. This is the cloud native version of SAP IQ and innovations related to SAP IQ are being delivered to SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake. This blog highlights some of the benefits available if you choose to migrate your on premise system to SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/top-5-reasons-to-migrate-sap-iq-systems-to-sap-hana-cloud-data-lake/ba-p/13556447

entry.title: Validation using a matrix table - SAC Analytics Story
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have two dimensions that need to be combined following specific validation rules. Unfortunately, I can't use the validation option on the model.

Instead, I'm using a matrix table where I mark authorized combinations with "1" and unauthorized ones with "0". I'm not sure if this is the best practice, so if you have a better approach, please let me know.

However, with this method, I don't know how to prevent data insertion in the unauthorized combinations. How can I achieve that?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Artificial Intelligence role in shaping the future of Energy Industry🌍💡
entry.content: Very Impressive/Knowledgeable article.   Please keep posting such articles.

entry.title: Embedded SAC in Intelligent Sales&Service Cloud V2: external data sources
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

we currently have a question regarding the usage of embedded SAC in Intelligent Sales/Service Cloud.

Is it possible to use external data sources or cloud data sources for creating stories withing embedded SAC?

The use case would be to have an application running on BTP storing data in a cloud database, which should be involved in Stories in embedded SAC of SAP Sales Cloud.

The documentation for SAP Service Cloud V2 says that we can only use those data sources from SAP Service Cloud Version 2.
 

However, the video in Analytics Guide also shows data sources marked as (extension), which is why our question is coming up, how external data should be treated.

Especially considering the approach of building side-by-side extensions, and having lots of data involved outside of Sales/Service Cloud in different cases.

Also, there is the approach of multilevel data sources. Could we solve this by creating an internal data source in Sales/Service Cloud, which references to the cloud data base?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: How do we send the PO Output to Partner Type LS instead of Partner Type LI on SAP S/4 HANA?
entry.content: May want to think about that some more... relevant information regarding the "who" and "where" are based on the partner to which an output is directed.

entry.title: What are the best approach to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails? (SLT)
entry.content: Currently we are replicating data form S/4 to BW/4 HANA system using SLT(using Delta merge). But we are facing issue while replicating ACDOCA data due to huge volume of data (using SLT Delta Merge). What are the best approaches to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails

entry.title: Re: How can we open IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 with O_DIRECT f...
entry.content: SAP IQ automatically uses direct I/O, you don't need to do anything to enable it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Is there any possibility of taking some type of test exam for certification?

I have only been able to find some demo questions, but is there a way to practice with test examples?

Thank you in advance!!  🙂

entry.title: Re: Automate Assignment Profile changes
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no API or connect that I am aware of to import/update the APMs.

We work with custom fields on the Users, and updating these via the connector. We have a set of values that are then defined in the APM, and those never really change. Of course, changing any label on a user will add/remove them from any active APM matching that rule. 

But this works for us.

Hope this helps,

Kris

entry.title: Re: How to hide credit hours field on new course home Course Details page
entry.content: we have the same question

entry.title: Re: Highlights for Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP S/4HANA | 2022 Rel
entry.content: Hi , does the compliance drop down for "Final Due Date Calculation in Proactive Maintenance Orders"  on maintenance item applicable only for single cycle plan ? we dont see the option to select offset start in strategy based PM's

entry.title: Re: SAP PO- Remove Double Quotes From Sent Request
entry.content: It is really useful and clear,thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: hdbsql - inline command to import database
entry.content:
Hello Zdenek,

I tried your inline command on Windows and Linux and got the same syntax error, but, if I escape the quotes around *, the syntax error goes away on both platforms. Could you please try that and see if it works for you as well? 
./hdbsql -n localhost -u MYUSER -p <mypass> "IMPORT "SBODEMOCZ".\"*\" AS BINARY FROM '/mypath/SBODEMOCZ' WITH IGNORE EXISTING;"

Best regards,
Jyotsana

entry.title: Re: Different behavior when submiting and calling transac...
entry.content: You should start by analyzing FM SHP_VL10_PRESTEP to build your code.

entry.title: Re: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (readi...
entry.content:
Even after running the npm install, the error was still there but then I had to manually update package.json and package-lock.json with "@sap/cds": "7.9.2" and then cds watch started and everntually application.

But it worked, thanks @patricebender. Now I'm ready to take over next challenge already ; )

entry.title: Re: Steps in roll out project process
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: LinkedIn learning Localization issue
entry.content:
Hi - we had the same issue - we only wanted courses with a title in English locale. As my locale was set to English, when importing you want to exclude anything with a blank title.  Using the instructions here Searching for NOT empty values in LMS - SAP Community you can search using % and this only returns courses which are NOT blank in the title i.e. have English titles.  We only import those courses 

Hope that helps

entry.title: How do you get Gender values to display for inactive users in Story Reporting?
entry.content: When adding the "Gender" field from the Personal Information table, it only provides values for active users. Inactive users show a result of NULL even though they have a gender value on their profile. Other fields are populating for inactive users, but for some reason fields like "Gender" and "Race" are not.

entry.title: Re: Unveiling Innovations: My experience at SIT KOLKATA 2024
entry.content: It was a pleasure assisting you. And can't deny your session has enlightened a lot. Looking forward to attend many more sessions here after. Cheers ! ✨

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Deprecation of 4X8
entry.content:
Dear Eldrian, 

thank you very much for this post. Any plans on deprecating scope item 4X8 for OnPrem versions as well?

Thanks
Tim

entry.title: Different percentage calculation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a particular requirement to manage. For my solution I have parents and sons. The requirement is to have a different percentage to pay for one parent (payer) in base to the son's number.

I will manage this with the relationships by parents and sons. In detail I will link in the relationship tab of the parent, the sons, so I will have as much relationships as sons number but I have not clear how to guide different percentage in base to the sons number.

Any idea?

Thanks

entry.title: Failed to Open the Connection
entry.content:
Hi there, my team and I are running into an interesting issue, where only one of us produces this error. We all have the same configurations via the Central Configuration, our ODBC connections all match, and we're all on 2016 support pack 9, patch 5. We're utilizing an enterprise Crystal server/repository to host our reports for use with a user facing app that interfaces with a database (Accela). The most recent team member can logon to the Crystal server/ repo, access and run reports without issue and even create/ save new reports. However, the reports then "break" or "lose connection" when running from the connected application (Accela). If another member of the team then accesses/ edits the report and saves back to the repository, the connection is restored and the report runs properly in Accela. Does anyone have any thoughts? Are we missing any plug-ins, extensions, modules, etc? We've tried comparing our rights, accounts, settings in CR, restarting the server, restarting services, etc. Here is the full error and stack trace:

Failed to open the connection.
6816_8264_{A91AFADA-FC23-42FA-B6EB-7916C2DDF255}.rpt
Description: An unhandled exception occurred during the execution of the current web request. Please review the stack trace for more information about the error and where it originated in the code.

Exception Details: System.Runtime.InteropServices.COMException: Failed to open the connection.
6816_8264_{A91AFADA-FC23-42FA-B6EB-7916C2DDF255}.rpt

Source Error:


An unhandled exception was generated during the execution of the current web request. Information regarding the origin and location of the exception can be identified using the exception stack trace below.

Stack Trace:


[COMException (0x800002f4): Failed to open the connection.
6816_8264_{A91AFADA-FC23-42FA-B6EB-7916C2DDF255}.rpt]
CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.Controllers.PrintOutputControllerClass.Export(CrReportExportFormatEnum exportFormat, Int32 Reserved) +0
AccelaReportAdapter2016.XReport.exportReport(ReportClientDocument reportClientDocument, NameValueCollection inputQueryString) +563
AccelaReportAdapter2016.XReport.Page_Load(Object sender, EventArgs e) +362
System.Web.UI.Control.OnLoad(EventArgs e) +108
System.Web.UI.Control.LoadRecursive() +90
System.Web.UI.Page.ProcessRequestMain(Boolean includeStagesBeforeAsyncPoint, Boolean includeStagesAfterAsyncPoint) +1533

entry.title: Re: Batch filling Project timesheet for team
entry.content:
Hi,

You can look into the "Notify Missing Timesheet" app or the "Team Utilization" app which will let you enter time on behalf of the team members. However, this doesnt let you enter the time in bulk for a project.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0bebd08dffca45afa67b1f751199afd0/5dbbb690aad5438fa4bb827c28856cda.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0bebd08dffca45afa67b1f751199afd0/8bfdac4adce94bb49f688e0d49c74379.html

As an alternative, you can build an app and post the time via the API https://api.sap.com/api/API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET/overview

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Regarding business Area
entry.content:
Hi All.

Could you please advise me why we are not assigning business area with the company code.

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud 

SAP Financial Information Management

entry.title: "Invalid key predicate" issue in RAP actions with optional date/time inputs
entry.content:
Hi all

when I create a RAP action and have an optional date/time field, regardless if it's hidden or not, if the user doesn't enter a date/time, the system responds with "Invalid key predicate". This is not a key field, but merely a parameter of the action. It's used from a Fiori app, and I can see the date being sent as "null". If I call it as an API omitting the date it's not an issue, only in Fiori.

Any idea what's causing this?

Thank you

entry.title: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content:
Hi - When using the search functionality in the Learning (LMS) New Home Page 1H2024 release we find the search returns far more courses than we expect.  How is the searching actually working?  What we would like is to ensure our inhouse company courses are listed first, then the remainder of the courses.  Can we prioritise the filters available e.g. Source X should be higher priority in results? Category Y should be higher priority than Z?

 

Giving users all courses the system 'thinks' it should isnt helpful because often the user will choose what they want especially if its at the top of the results and this could be a more expensive option to what we offer for free. there are time and cost repercussions for the company and it doesnt drive the behaviour we want to first select from our preferred options before looking wider.

1h2024 also removed the ability to search all filters ie start by all courses and narrow down to what we want so its not as if we can manage this issue via training and guidance on what to search for and how to find it quickly.  Any experience or suggestions around this would be much appreciated 

Thanks

entry.title: Lines of Business (LoBs) and Value Drivers in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Thanks for joining in!

In blog 2 we will provide a comprehensive overview on the next section of the SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis so called Lines of Business (LoB).  

*Access previous blogs:

  • Outline: Introducing Blog Series of SAP Signavio Process In... - SAP Community
  • Start page and four main pillars: Start page of SAP Signavio Process Insights, disco... - SAP Community
  • Blog 1: End-to-End processes: End-to-end Processes and modular processes in SAP ... - SAP Community
    Deep Dive: End-to-End processes: Source to Pay: Deep dive: End-to-End processes with a closer look... - SAP Community

Introduction

Lines of Business (LoBs) refer to different functional units of a company. Each line of business represents (Sub-) Processes in a certain business division (e.g. Finance, Sales, Procurement).


Identify opportunities for improvement

In the Lines of Business area, you can identify improvement opportunities for the business units by analyzing concrete value drivers.

Same with End-to-End Processes, the system outlines root causes of a potential issue with the value driver by filtering the information for each performance indicator and investigating into each individual document in LoB.

If you want to improve your Line of Business, don’t worry, we got you! The aim of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is to transform your processes and that is why the system proposes correction and innovation recommendations, based on performance and usage, categorized by type, including S/4HANA capabilities, situation handling, Fiori, automation, and machine learning.

Lines of Business

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition displays 9 Lines of Business in total:

  • Asset Management,
  • Finance,
  • Manufacturing,
  • R&D/Engineering,
  • Sales,
  • Service,
  • Sourcing & Procurement,
  • Supply Chain,
  • Sustainability, Compliance, and Enterprise Strategy.

 

 

Value drivers

Value drivers refer to the specific elements within a business process that significantly influence its overall effectiveness, efficiency, and success.

Below each LoB you will find the corresponding value drivers. Looking more closely into the Line of Business of Finance, in this case 9 value drivers are displayed below.

 

 

You can select one of the value drivers listed for each line of business you want to pay closer attention to.

Example

Let’s have a closer look into “Improve days payable outstanding”. Once you click on it, you restrict the information displayed on the Process Flows, Performance Indicators, Correction Recommendations, and Innovation Recommendations screens even further. You then see only the data that's relevant for the Improve days payable outstanding value driver.

As a global process owner for Finance, you want to reduce the number of days it takes for the company to pay its suppliers for goods or services received. Your first step is to investigate the Finance line of Business and pay closer attention towards the value driver “Improve days payable outstanding”.

For this performance indicator “Overdue and Accounts payable items” you can see that 62,379 items are affected (picture below).



If you click on the performance indicator “overdue and open Accounts payable items” you will find the overview below. View the top five highest number of objects that are not processed on time which causes the inefficiencies. You can access the detail list to further narrow down the insights.


Filtering capabilities

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition has powerful filtering capabilities, allowing you to see where issues are occurring and undergo root cause analysis. You can filter the data collected for process flows and standard performance indicators.


The available filters correspond to the fields in the data detail list and are therefore specific to each process flow or standard performance indicator. The most relevant filters are preselected as a suggestion for starting your analysis. 

Stay tuned, as we will dive deeper in the Process Performance Indicators in Blog 6!

Correction and Innovation recommendations

Correction and innovation recommendations play a pivotal role in improving your business processes to gain efficiency. As you can see in the screenshot below, in this case there is no correction recommendation available for the performance indicator “Overdue and open Accounts payable items”.

The picture below demonstrates the innovation recommendation you can implement, sorted by relevance and industry popularity.

 

In conclusion, Blog 2 of our eight-part blog journey on SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition dives into the concept of Lines of Business (LoB) and their corresponding value drivers.

Key takeaways:

  • LoB represent distinct areas of focus within an organization, each with its own set of value drivers that significantly influence process effectiveness and efficiency.
  • By analyzing these value drivers, you can identify improvement opportunities for your processes to run more efficiently. In addition to filtering capabilities, assisting you to further narrow down and understand the root causes, the system provides correction and innovation recommendations tailored to address specific performance indicators within each LoB.
  • Through this comprehensive approach, businesses can transform their processes and drive efficiency, ultimately achieving their strategic objectives.

In the next blog of our eight-part blog journey, we will explore Value Analysis.

Request your free* SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition today: Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition (ondemand.com)
*For all SAP maintenance customers

Any queries, please reach out to us by leaving a comment below or send us an email to: Signavio-discovery@sap.com

Kind regards,

Discovery team
SAP Signavio

entry.title: Re: Timely Time Sheet Alerts for no records on previous working day
entry.content:
Hi Neelesh

This is a wonderful blog. Although it was written some years ago but is still valid, thank you.

My question is that for the part 2, when we take the base object as Employee Timesheet, if the employee has not saved any time in the timesheet, then external Code for the object Employee timesheet is not generated, in that case the base object will not be present for the week and IC will not be running for that weekly record.

Any suggestions around this please?

entry.title: MRP Live MD01N CX_AMDP_EXECUTION_FAILED when setting the breakpoint in AMDP Badi PPH_MRP_RUN_BADI
entry.content:
I want to check the execution of MD01N, the part of AMDP enhancement as I want to implement my own Badi Implementation for Badi Definition PPH_MRP_RUN_BADI. For that I'm setting the breakpoint in the CL_FSH_PPH_MRP_RUN_BADI class( this BADI already has standard implementations which is executable ), for instance in method MDPS_ADJUST. Without this breakpoint everything is working correct. But when I want to check the data which is comes in this AMDP method in debug MD01N works around 5 minutes and then dumps. This dumps are always come in pair:  AMDP_EXECUTION_FAILED and MESSAGE_TYPE_X for CL_PPS4_MRP_DISPATCHER========CP.  Short details of this dumps: 

During execution of database procedure V_PPH_MAT_CTRLDD an error occurred. SQL code of the database: 2048 column store error:
"SAPHANADB"."CL_PPS4_MRP_RUN=>MAT_PLANT_MRP#stb2#20240425130751": line 16 col
3 (at pos 586): "SAPHANADB"."CL_PPS4_MRP_RUN=>MAT_PLANT_MRP": line 51 col 7
(at pos 1838): "SAPHANADB"."CL_PPS4_MRP_CHECKS=>READ_AND_CHECK": line 24 col
5  Olap temporary data size exceeded 31/32 bit 

I've already checked the different SAP notes but didn't find any solution. All of the notes related to CX_AMDP_EXECUTION_FAILED specifying different reasons of error but in my case this error appears only in debug mode. I've already tried to turn off the parallelization of MD01N( by using 'support' command which is described in note 2668805 ) but that didn't help either. I also checked that when I'm running MD01N for material which is planned for classic MRP run this AMDP not executed, it's executed only when material is planned for MRP Live run but even if I run this for classic material with the active breakpoint in AMDP then I also see the same behavior with runtime error. Execution is always freezes in this method CL_PPS4_MRP_RUN=>MAT_PLANT_MRP. Need your help, how I can execute MD01N with the breakpoint in amdp badi implementation to check the logic of execution inside this AMDP methods for MRP Live? It doesn't even work for a single material run in MD01N

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content: ...and if it wasn't obvious, you can use a script and the print function to get the values in the job log. Also, substitution parameters can be referenced like variables in the script.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: SPAGHETTI ALLA PUTTANESCA has been my primary dish recently when I need to cook something quickly for the family or guests.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud SCIM API version 1 and 2 high-level comparison
entry.content:
Hello @Matthew_Shaw we have just setup the connection with API 1 and I need your support in understanding the workload necessary to resolve a problem with ‘default roles’ for users and where team updates are dropping role assignments. You mentioned that the ‘PATCH’ request will fix both of these issues. We don't want to use hard coding but have some concerns on possible impact of the modification of the transformation to ignore handling of SAP Analytics Cloud Groups from the IdM system. Anything we should consider or get prepared for? 
Based on the above details I assume from the effort perspective it will be less effort then switch to API 2 or hybrid, especially that we don't use the SAP User Provisioning?

As usually 😉 I will appreciate your support much.

entry.title: Re: Interactive Reporting Dashboard for SAP Cloud Integration using SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have deployed it for a customer having more than 1,5 Million process run per month and the replication to SAC is not working. Is there a limit or some customization to enable the full replication of flow executions ?

Regards,

Pierre

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir,

when trying to replace a BW live model with another (almost identical) BW live model I face a problem with the measures. Although it shows that the model contains 37 measures I am not able to display, select or map them. I have no problems using these measures in a new chart. 

Do you have any suggesions on what I might be doing wrong?

Best regards, 
Laura

entry.content: what did you do ?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: Out of curiosity, what does your schema look like? I am curious why it is using decimal points in your results, as I do not think I've seen them in anyone else results.

entry.title: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory Price" data in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have search literally everywhere for "Inventory Price" of a material, in other words, the actual price we calculate with CKMLCP at the end of a period. However, could not find it. I have used both https://api.sap.com/ with "Customer Data Browser" app and also "Eclipse" program but no luck so far.

Does anyone know if there is a CDS for that data? We need it for some development.

These are the data we are searching for:

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to improve the processing speed on SAP Business B...
entry.content:
Hello

I suggest to test your tenant with the datacenter with your ISP and review the latency because in our case the improvement in this way help us to increase the performance and also review the tenant with SAP if its something to improve.

entry.title: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error while importing TR from Dev to PROD in TMS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Getting error - during client creation: Forbidden

while trying to import queue from PROD Transport Nodes.

Error from Transport Action Logs-

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Forbidden

entry.title: Re: Can I have both Crystal report designer 2016 and 2020...
entry.content:
Hi IT-App, that would depend on your current licensing agreement. You should probably contact your sales rep for your area. However you shouldn't have 2016 and 2020 installed on the same machine...see below.

From the CR FAQ Guide: see the B. 2. SAP Store additional questions section.

 

 
Is it OK to keep using an old version of SAP Crystal Reports when I want to also purchase SAP Crystal Reports 2020 with an upgrade discount?

Yes. There is no need to surrender the use of the old license of SAP Crystal Reports; you may still use the software and license for the older version at the same time as SAP Crystal Reports 2020 as an upgrade, but you are still under the Named User License for both versions. You may not reassign the license of the new version to someone else if you purchased with the upgrade discount.

 
Do I have to do anything to install SAP Crystal Reports 2020 purchased as an upgrade when I already have SAP Crystal Reports 2016 (or SAP Crystal Reports 2013 or SAP Crystal Reports 2011) installed?

Yes. For users of SAP Crystal Reports 2011, SAP Crystal Reports 2013, the software for these earlier versions will need to be uninstalled before SAP Crystal Reports 2020 is installed to the same computer.

For SAP Crystal Reports 2016 there is no need to uninstall, as SAP Crystal Reports 2016 will be upgraded to SAP Crystal Reports 2020. SAP Crystal Reports 2016 and SAP Crystal Reports 2020 cannot be installed side by side on the same computer.

Also keep in mind that SAP Crystal Reports 2016 is 32-bit and SAP Crystal Reports 2020 is 64-bit.
